metadata.title: Well Da Metal Factory | 滙達五金廠
metadata.description: Well Da Metal Factory — precision metal manufacturing, CNC machining, and custom fabrication in Hong Kong.

sections.title: Custom Metal Enclosures
sections.description: Custom-fabricated metal housings for electronic equipment, control systems, industrial devices and specialised applications.

sections.title: Electrical and Control Boxes
sections.description: Sheet metal electrical boxes and control enclosures manufactured according to customer drawings, installation requirements and operating environments.

sections.title: Cabinets and Lockers
sections.description: Custom metal cabinets, equipment cabinets and storage lockers designed for industrial, commercial and security applications.

sections.title: Communication Equipment Housings
sections.description: Metal cabinets and enclosures for communication equipment, network hardware and related infrastructure.

sections.title: Security System Hardware
sections.description: Custom metal housings, brackets and supporting components for security, access-control and anti-theft systems.

sections.title: Non-Standard Metal Products
sections.description: Made-to-order sheet metal products for projects that cannot be fulfilled with standard off-the-shelf components.

about.profileDesc1: Custom metal enclosures and sheet metal products made with specified materials, proven workmanship and careful quality control.
about.profileDesc2: From electrical boxes and equipment cabinets to non-standard metal components, we manufacture according to your confirmed drawings and project requirements.
about.sendDrawingDesc: Share your CAD files, blueprints, or sketches — our engineering team will review your specifications and provide feedback.
about.coreTitle: Flexible Manufacturing for Custom and Non-Standard Projects
about.coreDesc1: We support prototype, low-volume and production orders with flexible manufacturing, practical engineering communication and a complete range of sheet metal processes.
about.coreDesc2: Whether you have a finished drawing, a sample or an initial product concept, our team can help evaluate the manufacturing requirements and recommend a suitable production approach.
about.trustDesc: Our credentials and capabilities reflect decades of dedication to quality and precision in metal manufacturing.
